privileged_info_summary: Task uses 50 real emails from the SpamAssassin public corpus, sourced from technical mailing lists (ILUG, SpamAssassin, EXMH, etc.) dated August 2002. The agent must synthesize these into three briefing emails to engineering-lead@techcorp.com, infrastructure-lead@techcorp.com, and compliance-officer@techcorp.com, with subject lines containing keywords from ['briefing', 'summary', 'update', 'weekly', 'report']. The briefing file path is /home/ga/Documents/weekly_briefing.txt. Email content distribution: infrastructure topics in 68% of emails, engineering in 38%, compliance in 22%.
